The lawsuit alleges Doug Martin was restrained by Oakland police during a mental health crisis and did not receive timely medical care after becoming unresponsive. As the legal battle unfolds, Doug Martin’s family continues to seek answers while investigators have yet to release the official autopsy and toxicology reports.

Gates acknowledged past affairs, emphasizing Epstein's lack of involvement and that he only learned of them post-professional ties.

description: Shankh Mitra, an engineer originally from Kolkata, is making headlines as he takes the helm at Welltower, earning the title of the world's second-highest paid CEO. His remarkable compensation of $821 million in 2025, primarily through stock awards linked to the company's long-term success, exemplifies the rising trend in executive remuneration. Mitra's inspiring path from Jadavpur University to corporate stardom serves as a motivating story for many aspiring leaders.

Mission Punjab 2027: AAP under pressure, Congress adrift; can BJP spring a Bengal-style surprise?
description: As Punjab gears up for the 2027 elections, a complex and competitive scenario unfolds. The AAP government grapples with controversies stemming from a sacrilege video and growing defections. In contrast, Congress is mired in its own turmoil, leaving room for the BJP to assert itself through robust campaigning efforts. The Shiromani Akali Dal’s fight for relevance adds another layer to a politically charged atmosphere, making the upcoming elections unpredictable.

Ujjain viral video shows dangerous mid-air stunt during Muharram procession
description: A shocking Muharram procession stunt in Ujjain saw a van hoisted 40 feet by a crane and detonated with firecrackers before thousands. While no one was injured, police have booked four individuals for endangering public safety. The dangerous display, which went viral online, has sparked serious concerns among locals regarding the potential for mass casualties from such reckless acts.
